candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A summary row, but it appears to cover total operating D&A rather than a COGS-specific amount. The selected COGS bucket is only 'Goods for resale', and nothing in the label ties this D&A row specifically to cost of goods sold.

This is a D&A component row under the broader depreciation/amortisation area, but it is not labelled as COGS-related and looks more like part of total operating D&A than a cost-of-sales-specific item.
This is another component under the broader D&A section and is not identified as relating to COGS / cost of sales. Using it for COGS would be speculative.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is visible. The separate D&A lines appear to be total operating D&A, not clearly attributable to the selected COGS row 'Goods for resale'. Conservative choice is not to add any D&A separately to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: This is a separate same-level operating expense row above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows. Since the selected XSGA bucket excludes depreciation/amortisation, this summary D&A row should be added separately. It also matches the sum of the visible component rows, so it is the preferred summary to avoid double counting.
This appears to be a component of the total D&A summary row rather than a standalone amount to add separately. Do not choose when the summary row is available.
This appears to be a component of the total D&A summary row rather than a standalone amount to add separately. Do not choose when the summary row is available.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA components are 'External fulfilment and distribution cost', 'External marketing costs', 'Other external costs', and 'Cost of personnel', and explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization. A separate operating D&A summary row is visible before financial lines, so it should be added separately to XSGA. Summary row chosen instead of component rows to avoid double counting.
